decision: Do not schedule or run Gemini maintenance scans until a concrete Gemini tool/action, version or pin, authentication model, permission manifest, cost/quota class and log privacy boundary are reviewed.

evaluated_acceptance.evidence: No concrete Gemini execution path, version/pin, auth mode or secret boundary is present in Cabinet.
Read-only operation cannot be proven without a permission manifest and workflow/action review.
No Gemini dry run was executed; bounded Markdown plus JSON output remains untested.
Cost/quota class and log privacy risks are not yet documented for a concrete Gemini path.

organs.cabinet: Records the preflight blocker and no-effect boundary.
organs.bureau: Owns queue/task state and should keep T001 unresolved or blocked until external execution evidence exists.
organs.grabowski: May execute repo-local doc/contract changes, not Gemini runtime actions without a typed task/gate.
organs.github_ci: Primary check surface for PR and validation status.
organs.gemini: Not yet an authorized actor; proposal-only candidate after future preflight.

missing: bounded Markdown plus JSON dry-run evidence
next_action: Define a concrete Gemini execution manifest before any dry run or schedule decision.
